title: January 30
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|January}}
'''January 30''' is the 30th day of the year. There are 335 days remaining (336 in leap years).</noinclude>

*[[1940s#1942|1942]] – [[Marty Balin]] is born.
*[[1960s#1961|1961]] – [[Denys Cowan]] is born.
*[[1980]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 101|''Star Wars Weekly'' 101]] published.
*[[1987]] – [[Valene Kane]] is born.
*[[1991]] – [[Dominik Mayer]] is born.
*[[2001]] – ''[[Darth Maul: Shadow Hunter]]'' published.
*[[2002]] – [[The Official Star Wars Fact File 5|''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 5'']] published.
*[[2007]] – [[Allegiance (novel)|''Allegiance'']] published.
*[[2008]] – [[Dark Times 8|''Dark Times'' 8]] published.
*2008 – [[Knights of the Old Republic 25|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 25]] published.
*2008 – ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic Volume 3: Days of Fear, Nights of Anger]]'' published.
*[[2009]] – "[[Trespass]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2013]] – [[Agent of the Empire – Hard Targets 4|''Agent of the Empire – Hard Targets'' 4]] released.
*2013 – [[Star Wars Omnibus: Infinities|''Omnibus: Infinities'']] published.
*[[2014]] – [[LEGO Star Wars: Microfighters (video game)|''LEGO Star Wars: Microfighters'']] released.
*[[2019]] – [[Solo: A Star Wars Story Adaptation 4|''Solo: A Star Wars Story Adaptation'' 4]] published.
*2019 – [[Doctor Aphra (2016) 28|''Doctor Aphra'' (2016) 28]] published.
*2019 – [[Star Wars Adventures (2017) 17|''Star Wars Adventures'' (2017) 17]] published.
*[[2024]] – ''[[Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: The Menace Revealed Vol. 4]]'' published.
*2024 – ''[[The High Republic: Escape from Valo]]'' published.
<noinclude>
